2240010.name: Fortress VR
2240010.description:
▶ Fortress VR

The Fortress, a game of old memories is back with VR!!!
Lead your unique tank and win against people from all over the world on various maps and game modes.

▶ Realistic VR experience

You can experience a sense of immersion with the pleasure of realistic artillery shooting in front of you. The huge monsters and various traps that appear on the map are make you enjoy a realistic battle.

▶ characters full of personality

Take part in the battle by choosing a tank that suits your gameplay style. Tank characters can use different special skills.

▶ Online Multiplayer

Need strategic teamwork with your friends for win. Invite friends and participate 3 vs 3 battle. Fortress VR is an online multiplayer game that can be matched with people all over the world.
* In BETA TEST game, the 'Invite Friend' and 'Create Room' might not be available.

▶ Various things to play in the game

Play mini-games with your tank. you can interaction your characters to grow them.
